name: default

prompts.prompt: I need a banner that warns users their trial expires in X days and lets them upgrade
Build a notification that shows unread count, but hides when count is zero
Create a password input that shows strength indicator and has a show/hide toggle
Build a checkout flow: cart summary → shipping → payment → confirmation
Create a multi-step form wizard with back/next buttons and a progress indicator
Build an onboarding flow: welcome screen → profile setup → preferences → done
Something like Stripe's pricing table but with monthly/annual toggle
A GitHub-style issue label picker with color dots and search
Like Notion's page header with icon picker and cover image
Show a dashboard widget with loading → error → data states
A button that shows loading spinner while submitting, then success checkmark
Form that disables submit until all required fields are valid
A table of users with sortable columns and search
Display a list of transactions with amount, date, and status indicator
Show a grid of product cards with image, title, price, and add to cart button
Navigation that collapses to hamburger on mobile
A sidebar that becomes a bottom sheet on mobile
Cards that stack vertically on mobile but show in a grid on desktop
A form that validates email and posts to /api/subscribe
An autocomplete input that fetches suggestions from an API as you type
A file upload button that shows progress and calls an upload endpoint

Create a new internal tool called TodoTracker. UI Requirements: Display todos in a paginated table (default 25 per page). Columns: Title, Status, Created, Updated. Sortable by: Updated date (default desc), Created date, Title. Add a filter bar that filters by title (substring match) and status. Inline editing for todo title (with save/cancel). Status toggle button (Open <-> Closed). 'Create Todo' button that opens a modal with title input. Delete button with confirmation dialog. UI should update optimistically after any modification. Optimistic updates should be marked as 'pending' until the modification is complete.
Create a new page for a settings dashboard. It should have a header with the app title, a sidebar for navigation, and a main content area. Use the XDS theme system.
Set up the root layout for a new internal tool. Include proper body styling, theme provider with defaultTheme, and a layout with header and main content area.
Create an admin panel page layout with a fixed header, collapsible left sidebar, main content area, and a right panel for details. Wrap everything in the XDS theme.

holdout.prompt: A cookie consent banner that remembers user choice and has accept/decline buttons
Build a return request flow: select items → reason → shipping method → confirmation
Like Slack's emoji reaction picker but for status icons
A save button that shows 'Saving...' then 'Saved!' then returns to 'Save'
Show a timeline of events with timestamps and icons
A pricing comparison that scrolls horizontally on mobile
A search box that debounces input and shows live results from /api/search

fillerPrompts: How do I center a div?
What's the difference between let and const?
How do I make an API call in JavaScript?
What's a good way to handle errors in React?

I think Bootstrap would be better here
